description: Topic resource. A named logical event stream divided into a fixed number of partitions. Sequencing, offsets, and ordering are scoped to a single (topic, partition).

partitions.description: Number of partitions. Required, no default. Fixed at topic creation; cannot be grown or shrunk on a live topic.

retention.description: ISO 8601 duration (e.g., PT24H) controlling the TTL for evbk_producer_state rows for this topic. Capped at P14D (14 days); values exceeding the cap are rejected at topic creation/update.

streaming.description: Opaque backend configuration. Validated against the chosen backend type's config_schema at topic registration. The well-known sub-field 'backend_selector' (with 'type' + 'metadata' filters) is used by the broker to resolve the backend instance via cluster.discover_shards().
